title: Fresh Jolt To Mamata Didi: Celebrity TMC MP Koel Mallick Resigns From Rajya Sabha, Party's Strength Dips To 9 In House
description: Mamata Banerjee faced another backlash on Thursday as yet another Trinamool Congress (TMC) MP resigned from the Rajya Sabha. The fresh setback came as actor-politician Koel Mallick tendered her resignation, becoming the second TMC leader to resign from the Upper House in a day.
